title: Senior Software Engineer - Cars24 South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cars24 South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Cars24 South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cars24 South Asia Partners:
Cars24 South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24 South Asia Partners!
